# Hand Gang of Gandii

First mentioned: **3301-06-05**

## Biography

The Hand Gang of Gandii was a pirate crew that embodied the brutal meritocracy of Archon Delaine's expanding criminal empire. In mid-3301, the gang was ordered to seize direct control of the Gandii system as an initiation rite: success would grant them full membership in the Kumo Crew, while failure meant they would "likely never be seen again."

The crew's campaign, alongside the Camorra of Krisha's simultaneous assault on Krisha, represented Delaine's method of transforming scattered pirates into organised warlords who enforced his will and taxes. Though their initial call for allies yielded disappointing recruitment, the Hand Gang's struggle illustrated how the Kumo Crew absorbed smaller criminal groups through a combination of violent opportunity and lethal consequence.
